description: Smart push policy for README Intelligence System. Controls push behavior based on issue severity.

rules.description: Folder modified but README.md is missing
rules.message: BLOCKED: Missing README.md in changed folder(s). Run: readme-repair

rules.description: README older than folder content by > 120 seconds
rules.message: BLOCKED: README drift detected. Run: readme-update <folder>

rules.description: README exists but missing Purpose / Contents / Change Log sections
rules.message: WARNING: README missing required sections. Run: readme-repair <folder>

rules.description: Python files with syntax errors in changed folder
rules.message: BLOCKED: Python syntax errors detected. Fix syntax before pushing.
BLOCKED: Critical health score. Run: readme-score <folder>

rules.description: Root README.md not rebuilt after organ changes
rules.message: BLOCKED: Root README stale. Run: readme-root-build
BLOCKED: Validation failed. Run: readme-validate to see issues.

safe_mode.description: When true: disable Claude, use rule-based only, never block push (warn only)
